headline: 3 Value Stocks with Warning Signs
summary: Value stocks typically trade at discounts to the broader market, offering patient investors the opportunity to buy businesses when they’re out of favor. The key risk, however, is that these stocks are usually cheap for a reason — five cents for a piece of fruit may seem like a great deal until you find out it’s rotten.

raw.headline: 3 Value Stocks with Warning Signs

headline: Kuwait Oil Company Awards Long-Term Agreement to Advance Technology Development Ahmadi Innovation Valley
summary: HOUSTON, July 22, 2026--Kuwait Oil Company (KOC) awarded Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) a multi-year agreement to support the development of the Ahmadi Innovation Valley (AIV), a flagship initiative that advances Kuwait’s energy sector transformation.

headline: These Analysts Cut Their Forecasts On Halliburton Following Q2 Results
summary: Halliburton (HAL) beat Q2 earnings estimates with adjusted EPS of 55 cents and revenue of $5.714 billion. CEO expects revenue growth and margin expansion.

headline: Halliburton Tops Estimates as International Demand Strengthens
